title: Our top-ranked stock yesterday finished +12% last week.
author: StockGPTpro
selftext:
We've been heads down building a stock ranking tool for the last 2 years.



Last week the stock our system had ranked #1 in the S&P ended up closing +12%.



The #2 ranked stock finished +10%.



Still kind of surreal seeing stuff like that happen in real time.



The original idea was actually pretty simple:



Instead of trying to predict one stock, what if you ranked every stock in the S&P 500 every single day?



Strongest to weakest.



Most investing tools make you dig through charts, news, Reddit posts, analyst opinions, earnings reports etc trying to figure out what deserves attention.



We kept thinking:



What if there was just a live leaderboard?



Not "this stock will 100x."



Not "get rich quick."



Just a smarter way to narrow down opportunities.



Honestly the weirdest part of building this has been realizing how overwhelmed most investors are.



Everyone talks about discipline and psychology, but most people are drowning in information before they even place a trade.



That’s basically why we built StockGPT.



Still early, still improving it daily, but seeing the rankings play out live has been pretty motivating, including a lovely 200% rise in 3 months from one stock...



Curious if anyone else here prefers ranking systems over traditional buy/sell signals?
